title: JSON Parser with Streaming
description: Implement a JSON parser that can handle large files through streaming and provides detailed parse errors.
requirements: Handle large files without loading fully into memory
Support incremental parsing for real-time streams

few_shot_examples.code:
from enum import Enum, auto
from typing import Iterator

class TokenType(Enum):
    LBRACE = auto()
    RBRACE = auto()
    LBRACKET = auto()
    RBRACKET = auto()
    COLON = auto()
    COMMA = auto()
    STRING = auto()
    NUMBER = auto()
    TRUE = auto()
    FALSE = auto()
    NULL = auto()

def tokenize(source: str) -> Iterator[tuple[TokenType, str, int, int]]:
    line, col = 1, 1
    i = 0
    while i < len(source):
        # ... tokenization logic
        pass
